# Nuxt 4 Template

> Template world-class para iniciar qualquer projeto com Nuxt 4, autenticacao BFF e arquitetura em layers.

Stack: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn-vue, Pinia, Vitest, Playwright.

## Layers

- **base** — Fundacao: Tailwind, shadcn-vue, utils, tipos, domain, logger
- **auth** — Autenticacao BFF com JWT httpOnly, refresh deduplicado, middleware, guards
- **home** — Landing page generica
